text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After stocking up on training goods with Inari
One at the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Good. Looks like we crossed off everything on
our list at that last shop!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! Most of it's for me, so it'd be rude
if I didn't come.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it's a raffle! They do 'em 'round these parts
too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I did my share back in my hometown but never
really had any luck. Still, somethin' always keeps
me comin' back to try again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I remember receiving a raffle ticket
from our last purchase.
choice_data_list: Here, you should have this ticket.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait just a sec! That came from your shoppin'. It's only right that you use it.
choice_data_list: Then let's spin for the raffle together.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait just a sec! That came from your shoppin'. It's only right that you use it.
choice_data_list: Then let's spin for the raffle together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The items I bought are for Inari One to use. In
other words, this ticket belongs to the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I like the sound of that. Makes me wanna
crank that lever even more!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right, this is our big chance! Let's spin it together and reel in somethin' huge!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Oh, you two are going to try together?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yes, count the both of us in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taking on the challenge, we spin it together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: W-we got... the grand prize?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, yeeees! Our little ol' raffle ticket turned
into a grand prize! I didn't actually think we'd nail
it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I guess pullin' it together combined both
our lucks!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a hot spring getaway... I can't believe it!
Hot springs are my go-to when I think of
vacations!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Delicious food, big baths—talk about vacationin'
in style! Hehe, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Except... we gotta focus on the now. Either way, it
looks like this ticket won't expire for a while.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So could ya hold onto it for the time being?
choice_data_list: I don't mind... but are you sure?
I don't mind... but are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sure as ever! I needa focus on holdin' my ground in those central races. 'Sides, if our trip is a victory celebration, then I can really relax!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Not a bad idea to save the goods for later, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right? Now that we've got somethin' fun to look
forward to, let's keep at it!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeeees! We did it, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeeees! We did it, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, this is a nice first prize! You don't see
somethin' this fancy every day!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A meal this good deserves to be eaten quick!
Let's get right to it once we're back at your office!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we indulge in the delicious deluxe
carrot hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! We got somethin' good!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's one generous prize! Just look at this giant
heap!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Ya know what this calls for—a carrot
festival! Maybe we could get Creek to give us a
hand.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You gotta come too! C'mon, there's no time
better than now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I enjoy the carrot festival with Inari
One and her friends!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, well, at least we got somethin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this carrot looks pretty good. Bet it tastes
great just on its own!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's split it once we get back. Hey, how do ya
like your carrots anyways?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I eat my share of the carrot with Inari
One!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guuugh! We pulled a dud!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Boss! That was our chance to strike gold,
and I blew it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Boss! That was our chance to strike gold,
and I blew it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess... But I wanted to win with style, not
cramp it! Ugh, it's actually friggin' frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After pulling a blank, Inari One's mood takes a
sharp nosedive...
